<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

ENTER?

Image Credits

Images not listed below are in the public domain, mostly taken from Wikimedia Commons or Artvee. All images have been modified. No AI art was used.

Used a personal image converter program for image editing and glitch effects. Special thanks to TotallyNotChase's glitch-this library.

Return to Main Menu

Suicide, unreality, strong language, anything else you might find on anonymous messageboards online.

To Play

Click and links in blue and bold to progress.

About

This game lets you communicate with other players. In many places, you can leave anonymous messages for people to see.

The game has at least 20k words. I estimate it takes at least two hours to see everything, but feel free to duck in for a few minutes and then leave. Ideally the landscape will change over time as more messages pop out, so you can check back regularly for new text. Assuming nothing breaks.

The game doesn't have a real ending. If you want, you can consider exploring every room and messageboard in the game to be the ending. There's a few secrets hidden here and there. A list of all the teleport codes is included near the end of this page, if you don't feel like figuring things out yourself.

The Message System

The most experimental part of the game. If you can't see or send messages, the game is broken.

Generally, say whatever you want as long as it's not hate speech or illegal. Leave as many messages as you want. I will delete truly horrible messages, but remain hands-off for the most part. Go ham.

Making Of

Made for Shufflecomp 2023/2024 in slightly less than three weeks. I used another project as a template from my other projects, so it wasn't entirely made from scratch in three weeks, but most of it was. Used zehanort's iffinity, something like Twine but more involved on the coding side.

In Shufflecomp you submit eight songs and are given eight songs from eight other randomly selected participants, then make a game based on at least one of the songs. I used Bad Moon Rising, a song about the apocalypse, and Crumbling Castle, a song about hiding in a crumbling castle during the apocalypse. Evidently I am a fan of the apocalypse. There are a few references to other songs I got, but it's mostly those two.

The full list of Shufflecomp songs I received, and usage notes [Spoilers]
  • Bad Moon Rising - Creedence Clearwater Revival: The game involves a network of dead worlds connected to each other.
  • King Gizzard and the Lizard Wizard - Crumbling Castle - Multiple castles in this game, from the name of the in-story game to some of the areas you can visit. The general concept of hiding in a bunker playing video games while the world ends outside. This song used to be on the title screen since it was public domain, but I removed it due to audio issues.
  • Akbar - Jeffrey Dallas - There is a corn, and a character who befriends the corn. Unlike in the song, the corn survives this one.
  • No More Hot Dogs by Hasil Adkins - Would have added more hot dog references if I could. Hope there are enough murder references to satisfy fans of this song.
  • Confidence Man - C.O.O.L Party - One character is obsessed with parties. Does it count?
  • Body of Desire - October - As far as a general lack of motivation to live goes, examples aren't difficult to find here. Found it hard to include more specific references.
  • Destroy Everything You Touch - Ladytron and Wake Up - Sion, SOULBYSEL Had a hard time incorporating these two. A few messages might be references if you squint.

Inspiration
  • Submachine Universe, from which many direct concepts were stolen. To wit: exploring a network of teleporters scattered across abandoned and broken places, with no signs of life except cryptic messages left by travelers you can't see. You also need to enter numbers to access different teleporters. Never beat this game, but there's an interesting 100% speedrun.
  • This Website Will Self-destruct, a website where you could write anonymous messages and view anonymous messages sent by others. It would delete everything if 24 hours passed without a new message being sent. As of March 2025, this has happened and all the messages are now gone.
  • A lot of music taken from Glitch, a now-dead MMO I played years ago.
  • ifMUD, a text-based virtual world (MUD) where you can hang out with interactive fiction fans. Boasts a multitude of unusual rooms added by various users over the years. Took inspiration for the dorm area from here. The description of the node teleport was also stolen wholesale from catherine's portals. Sorry, catherine.
  • The Beginner's Guide, specifically the Notes game where you walk through a 3D environment full of notes supposedly left by other people. You soon learn that every note was actually left by the developer, a single person masquerading as a whole world of players. I really like The Beginner's Guide and recommend it. Even if you don't buy it, you can watch a playthrough on Youtube like I did.
Various areas were inspired by/stolen from other places. [Spoilers]
  • I put the Backrooms in this game because I could. The playground area is a ripoff of liminal playground concepts, including "Level FUN". It's also heavily inspired by "PLAYGROUND - trailer", a cool trailer for an animated horror series set in a seemingly neverending playground. As of 2024, the series is currently in development.
  • The pine grove area is heavily inspired by the outskirts of Redacre from The Blackout Club. Specifically the end-of-prologue area. It was a unique game where the devs could hijack NPC interactions and talk directly to the players, leading to a lot of fun dialogue.
  • Greenhouse is inspired by Greenhouse from Undertale Yellow.
  • The Novum Instrumentum room is inspired by Charm Cochran's Novum Instrumentum seed from the first Seedcomp planting round.

Full List of Node Teleport Codes [Spoilers]
  • 19283 - Greenhouse - Within Flower
  • 9272 - Maintenance Tunnel X - End
  • 666 - Ocean of Fire
  • 8108 - Drowned Apparatus
  • 1911 - Nexus Dome
  • 810 - Dungeon
  • 340 - Transmission Tower
  • 152 - Hidden Grove
  • 67 - Caterpillar's Stomach
  • 81818181 - Sky Grove
  • 416 - Bedroom
  • 2024 - Familiar Place
  • 124 - Cell
  • 9999999999 (ten nines) - Bridge - Sky Island

Return to Main Menu

About This Game

You can make out a few, if you really concentrate. 8:10... 340...

Indicator Corridor - Quantitative

A metal corridor lined with glass orbs, each filled with glowing red-gold fluid. The walls are digital planes abundant with light, flashing by too rapidly to read. Set in the middle of the eastern wall is a

The corridor runs nor��4۩ and south. Steps to the east down to an open glass door, beyond which you can see a stairwell. A bronze slab hangs on a heavy oaken door to the west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Indicator Corridor - Qualitative

A metal corridor lined with glass orbs, each crackling with energy. The walls are digital planes abundant with light, words in an unknown language scrolling past at breakneck pace.

The corridor runs north and south. An elegant wooden door inlaid with glass and gold leads to the east, with a thick dangling from its handle. A nondescript wooden door leads to the west.

A gold switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Nexus Dome

A dizzying range of colors filters down from a stained-glass dome, under which rests a cage-like made of interlocking bronze arms. Gold pipes and wires extend out from the base of the cage, running under the glass-topped floor into the walls. Wires travel from a into the ceiling.

From the corridor to the north, you see flashes of red light. A sliding glass door, behind which you can see smudges of red and white, leads east. Steam hisses from a corridor to the south.

Gear Corridor

Beyond the glass walls, clockwork machines click and hum. Bronze gears tick in their gearshafts. On the ceiling, liquid rushes through glass pipes, occasionally leaking onto the floor where the pipes have cracked. Darkly shimmering red fluid accumulates in small pools. A is screwed into the western wall.

The corridor runs north and sou%�MN. A sliding glass door, thick enough that you can see barely anything beyond, leads east.

Glass Tower - Stairwell

The stairs are hovering blocks of glass, spiraling up the tower. Glass orbs cycle through the air, some cracked, drizzling incandescent red fluid. A glowing red-gold pool has accumulated at the bottom of the stairwell, beneath a in the nook under the stairs.

Steps to the west lead out, into a metal corridor.

Glass Tower - Summit

A glass dome at the pinnacle of the glass tower. Through the windows you see other towers, other castles. Or perhaps just one castle duplicated across all available space, the same towers repeating infinitely into the distance, forever. A is fixed to the wall.

The only way out is down.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Dining Hall

An enormous room, most of which is taken up by long tables draped in rich velvet tablecloth. Gilt chairs, straight-backed and elegant, line the table. The velvet tablecloth boasts a panoply of golden platters and cups, but instead of food, all they hold is a fiery red liquid. In some bowls it simmers. In others it sizzles. But there is nothing edible here.

A is built into the wall, surrounded by intricate patterns carved into the wood.

An oaken door to the east leads out. A small metal door is situated to the south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Clock Lounge

A lounge of some kind. Rich red carpet, plush rugs, plush sofas, and gently ticking clocks covering the walls. A fireplace burns bright, and to its side, a glimmers.

An enormous clock on one wall has elegant wrought-iron hands behind a shining glass face and gilt paneling. The clock is stopped at five minutes to midnight.

An elegant wooden door inlaid with glass and gold leads west, back to the corridor.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Novum Instrumentum

Most of this comparatively tiny room is occupied by an enormous clockwork contraption, a hulk of a machine sporting bronze gears and steam hissing out from pipes and release valves and all kinds of indicators and lights. It is cracked down the center, exposing a mass of metal scraps and twisted black wires that erupt with occasional bursts of gold sparks. You can see no way to interface with the machine.

A is attached to a small metal door that leads north.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Sinkhouse

Sinks of various heights and sizes rise around you, an artificial forest. Red fluid trickles into basins of porcelain and gold and steel, and drops of red cover the white tiles on the floor. Pipes trace erratic patterns along the walls. A is screwed onto a particularly large pipe, its surface misted by red droplets.

A thick sliding glass door, behind which you can see glimmers of multicolored light, leads west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Bathhouse - West

The floor is pitted with pools of various shapes, containing various liquids. There are circular pools of water, but also liquids of white, blue, red. Pools that shimmer and ripple and pools encrusted by a thin layer of frost and pools that radiate heat, from which colored smoke wafts. Spotlights above sway, dappling the walls with refracted light. A hovers above a bubbling pool of something red and molten.

The room darkens to the east. A sliding glass door, thick enough that you can see barely anything beyond, leads west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Bathhouse - East

At the far end of this room is an enormous pool of water, frothing and bubbling. The lights are dim here, and between the darkness and the depth of the water, it is impossible to tell where the bottom is. Strong currents make it impossible to dive in without being pushed back to the surface.

A is barely visible on the white-tiled wall.

The room brightens to the west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Red Lounge

Rich red carpet. A delicate wooden chair sits before a glass-topped table, engraved with a spiraling pattern. Creamy off-white walls, on which a shines. Glass chandeliers hang from a high ceiling crossed with oaken beams.

A nondescript wooden door leads to the east.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Red Lounge

Creamy off-white carpet. A red plastic lawn chair sits before a gold table engraved with a spiraling pattern. Deep red walls, on which a shines. Chandeliers of red glass hang from a high ceiling crossed with oaken beams.

A nondescript wooden door leads to the east.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Red Lounge

Rich red carpet. A delicate glass chair sits before a red plastic table surrounded by red plastic walls. A , framed by plastic, shines on the floor. Wooden chandeliers hang from a high ceiling crossed with glass beams.

A nondescript gold door leads to the east.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Red Lounge

Glass carpet cuts at your feet. The chair, walls, and table are covered in soft red fuzz. There is no ceiling, or it is so high above that you can't see it.

A shines up from the center of the glass carpet.

A red door leads to the east.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Sky Grove

Enormous yellow ferns curl out of the ground and arch together. Under them, metallic arms intertwine into a cage-like , covered in dark draping vines.

The grass below is a shade of green so bright it almost looks gold. A gray pokes through. Scattered around it are scraps of metal, screws and hinges half-covered by dirt and dew.

The undergrowth is thick enough to block most paths through the forest. You can move north, northeast, and south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? 19:11's Altar

Yellow ferns many time your height shiver in a breeze redolent with the fresh scent of saffron. The golden pillar that spears through the center of this grove is engraved with a language you don't understand. It hums at a pitch resonant with your bones, shivering into the core of you. The by the pillar's side is minuscule in comparison.

The undergrowth here is thick enough to block most paths through the forest. You can move northwest, southwest, and west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? 15:2's Altar

A rectangle of stone on the ground, now overgrown with golden moss, indicates the place where a building once stood. In the rectangle's center, a black monolith is covered with inscriptions you cannot make out in the dim lighting. Four candles, placed equidistant from the monolith, flicker erratically. Lush flowering vines cover the bottoms of the candles and the nearby.

Thick curtains of hanging vines block all paths but the way back north, and a small space to the south where you can squeeze through the foliage.

Fallen Saint

A stone wall surrounds the bottom half of an enormous stone statue, its top half sheared clean off. Dark vines, dotted with golden flowers, crawl over the statue and a neighboring . Three sides of the wall have been eroded down to knee-height, with an overgrown doorway in the remaining side leading northwest to a more intact room that stands despite the ravages of time.

The vegetation grows sparser to the north. Paths through the undergrowth cut east and south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? You count sixty-seven in number.

Wind Prayer

Within the darkness of this room you distinguish a multitude of , all blank, hanging from the stone walls and the partially collapsed ceiling. Wind blows through holes from above, and the scrolls sway in the breeze. Flecks of gold pollen swirl. A is placed unobtrusively in the corner.

The only exit is a doorway in the southeast, half-concealed behind a blanket of yellow-green leaves.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Empty Thrones

This grove is filled with concentric rings of stone pedestals, some crumbling, most in surprisingly pristine condition. Each pedestal is empty. In the center of all the rings, a hovers.

To the north, the vegetation thins until it vanishes entirely. Paths lead south and southeast through the forest.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? 8:10's Altar

The ferns part here, revealing a sheer cliff that drops into swirling gray mist. A thicket of vines near the edge prevents you from falling. Before it is a simple stone fountain, spouting red liquid into a shallow basin. Yellow flowers grow around it. A hovers directly above.

South takes you back into the forest.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Shattered Path

The ferns part here, revealing a sheer cliff beneath a roseate sky streaked with gold. All around, the wind howls. Small snowflakes flurry down around you, mingled with specks of yellow pollen. You feel no cold.

The remnants of a bridge stretch into the air. Only a few feet of the bridge remain. Looking down beneath the wooden slats reveals several cracked supports pillars, then nothing. A hovers above the empty air left behind by the cracked supports, thankfully still within reach.

The forest thickens to the north.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Dorm W-4

The pit is jagged, its sides an accumulation of broken machinery and rubble. At the bottom, a small circle of debris has been cleared away. A flickers in the middle.

A faint circle of light overhead is the only sign that there is a world above.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %> <% /*** * code for snippet "dormR8" (file: "meta/keypad.js") ***/ /* From https://gist.github.com/code-boxx/7fe1a40cd24e1e9c3ec33d2801afed10 * Copyright Code Boxx, released under MIT License */ var numpad = { // (A) PROPERTIES // (A1) HTML ELEMENTS hDisplay: null, // number display maxDig: 4, maxDec: 0, disabled: false, // (B) INIT - CREATE NUMPAD HTML init: () => { // (B1) NUMPAD WRAPPER numpad.hDisplay = document.getElementById("numDisplay"); // (B2) ATTACH BUTTONS let hbWrap = document.getElementById("numBWrap"), buttonator = (txt, css, fn) => { let button = document.createElement("button"); button.setAttribute("type", "button"); button.innerHTML = txt; button.classList.add(css); button.onclick = fn; hbWrap.appendChild(button); }; for (let i = 7; i <= 9; i++) { buttonator(i, "num", () => numpad.digit(i)); } buttonator("&#10502;", "del", numpad.delete); for (let i = 4; i <= 6; i++) { buttonator(i, "num", () => numpad.digit(i)); } buttonator("C", "clr", numpad.reset); for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) { buttonator(i, "num", () => numpad.digit(i)); } buttonator(0, "zero", () => numpad.digit(0)); buttonator("&#10004;", "ok", numpad.select); }, // (C) BUTTON ACTIONS // (C1) NUMBER (0 TO 9) digit: (num) => { if (!numpad.disabled) { // (C1-1) CURRENT VALUE let v = numpad.hDisplay.value; // (C1-2) WHOLE NUMBER (NO DECIMAL POINT) if (v.indexOf(".") == -1) { if (v.length < numpad.maxDig) { if (v == "0") { numpad.hDisplay.value = num; } else { numpad.hDisplay.value += num; } } } // (C1-3) DECIMAL POINT else { if (v.split(".")[1].length < numpad.maxDec) { numpad.hDisplay.value += num; } } } }, // (C3) BACKSPACE delete: () => { if (!numpad.disabled) { var length = numpad.hDisplay.value.length; if (length == 1) { numpad.hDisplay.value = 0; } else { numpad.hDisplay.value = numpad.hDisplay.value.substring(0, length - 1); } } }, // (C4) CLEAR ALL reset: () => { if (!numpad.disabled) { numpad.hDisplay.value = "0"; } }, // (C5) OK - SET VALUE select: () => { if (numpad.hDisplay.value === "9272") { window.crumblingcastle.machine.success(numpad.hDisplay, "maintenanceTunnelX"); numpad.hDisplay.style.borderColor = "green"; numpad.disabled = true; } else { window.crumblingcastle.machine.failure(numpad.hDisplay); } }, }; $(function () { numpad.init(); }); %>

The door clicks open.

Go south.

A harsh buzz, and the screen clears.

Dorm R-8

At the end of the room, a rusty door locked with a leads south. A metal plaque on the door, hanging by one screw, reads: "AUT-OPI__D P_RSONN__ ON_Y".

The door is flanked by two panels. Only the to the right is lit, the left cracked into three parts.

Rows of metal pods glitter in the shadows, continuing to the west.

Dorm R-9

Above looms a crooked canopy of leaden pipes. Buzzing green lights give off an ectoplasmic glow. Metal pods glitter, strung together by black wires. One pod stands open.

A is set into the wall. Its light washes over you.

The room runs to the east and west.

Dorm R-10

Metal pods stretch into the distance. Machinery hums, resonant. Amidst the dark snarl of pipes and wires, a hovers.

The room runs to the east and west.

Dorm R-11

Several pods here have been smashed to pieces by enormous chunks of debris. Wreckage and broken pipes lie scattered across the floor. A hovers over the crushed remnants of a pod.

The room runs to the east and west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Dorm R-12

The lights flicker here. Pods lie in various states of upheaval, some shattered or blasted with bullet holes. Torn wires send the occasional flurry of green sparks into the air. A is set into the side of a cracked metal pod.

The room runs to the east and west, where the lights dim.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Dorm R-13

The lights here are largely broken. The few that retain power flicker erratically, illuminating destruction: a sagging ceiling, a floor littered with metal scrap, a pit that yawns under a tangle of black wires. Dark silhouettes surround you. Brief flashes of light reveal them to be destroyed pods, wires trailing from their shattered walls. A shines over a heap of rubble.

The room runs to the east and west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Pod Tower

In the darkness, walls pitted with rust stretch upwards to vertiginous heights, lined with rows upon rows of metal pods. There are no stairs or elevators visible; no way up.

You can only go back east.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Maintenance Tunnel X

Detritus crunches beneath you as you make your way through the tunnel. The concrete floor is carpeted with rubble. Doors are set into the walls at regular intervals, but all are rusted shut.

At the tunnel's halfway point, a floats in the air.

The tunnel runs north and south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Maintenance Tunnel X - End

At the end of this tunnel, a cage-like made of interlocking metallic arms is set into the wall. Somewhere, water drips. The air is filled with the ambient hum-buzz of machinery.

By the side of the apparatus is a .

The tunnel continues north.

Collapsed Hall

Puddles of water cover the floor. Small square windows, some cracked, are embedded into the walls at regular intervals. Wind howls through them, disturbing the mist. Outside you see white clouds tinged with a faint blue-green glow, refracted from the blue-green stone beneath you.

One window is covered by a .

The hall runs north and south.

Flooded Hall - Intersection

Water pours through holes in the ceiling, dripping down white flowers and white vines, pattering onto stone, flowing through long-worn crevices, before falling away through small cracks and holes threading through the floor. A sits half-covered in vines.

The hall runs north and south. To the northeast, steps ascend to a corridor that looks to be in slightly better shape. An overgrown hallway intersects with this one to the west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Flooded Hall - North

This section of the hall is flooded with a low layer of water, and more pours from the ceiling. On the walls, luminescent fungi cast a rippling glow. Mushrooms sprout all around you, and a sits nestled among them.

The hall runs north and south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu?
