This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Flooded Hall - Southern Waterfall

The water falls with more ferocity, here. A miniature rainstorm contained in this one room. At the end of the hall is a sheer curtain of water, a waterfall crashing down with a deafening roar. The is concealed behind the waterfall.

The hall ends here. You can only go back north.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Greenhouse - Entrance

This might have been a normal greenhouse once, but all the plants are covered by a thin layer of white fuzz. Their original colors can barely be discerned beneath the growth. White flowers sprout from other flowers, from the ceiling, from the walls. White vines lash together, stretching between plants and trees, like cobwebs. Unlike cobwebs, you can walk through them, feeling only a vague humidity as they dissolve at your touch and reform behind you.

A is nestled in the center of one flower, now overgrown with fuzz. The light here is a soft green. From somewhere plays the distant trickle of water.

An archway to the northeast leads to an overgrown stone hall. A path runs north and south.

Greenhouse - Northwestern Fountain

A stone fountain, covered in white flowers, plays merrily in the center of this little plaza. Five benches surround it. On one sits a gleaming . Crumpled robots lie in the white foliage, obscured mostly by white leaves.

The path is too choked by vines here for you to continue. There is no way to go but back east.

Greenhouse - North

Wind whistles through holes in the waterlogged ceiling. White flowers carpet the floor, curling their vines towards you. Their texture is the same as the other flowers - strangely soft, as if made of mist. You wave your hand through them and they disperse, then reform.

A , partly covered in vines, has been affixed to the stone.

The path runs north, south, and west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Greenhouse - Northern Pond

A small pond sits amidst the foliage, rippling gently. Beams of sunlight shine from holes in the ceiling and glitter on the water. Tiny lilypads float on the pond's surface, boasting small white lilies. A bobs among them.

The path is too choked by vines here for you to continue. There is no way to go but back south.

Greenhouse - Flower

The bud of an enormous white flower, at least ten meters in height, rises from a circle of stone. A small opening between the petals is just large enough to allow entrance. A sits beside it.

All around are white flowers and white vines.

You can step inside, or take the small stone path north.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Greenhouse - Within Flower

You stand inside a giant flowerbud. Soft white petals curve upwards: delicate things, silken to the touch. Planted in the center is another cage-like , comprised of metal rods intertwined with white vines and wires.

Light filters through a small opening between the petals, leading outside.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Hall of Statues

On both sides of this corridor, overgrown statues sit in regularly placed alcoves, the features of each obscured by white flowers. Piles of waterlogged machinery lie neglected on the floor, some overgrown with white fuzz. The walls are covered in it.

One alcove is populated by a .

Steps descend to a flooded intersection in the southwest. To the northeast, the corridor opens into a stairwell.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Overgrown Storage

Scattered here and there are metallic crates. Most are overgrown with twisting white vines that disperse at your touch, and reform once you withdraw from them. A has been nailed onto one of the crates.

To the south, a rusty door leads to an overgrown hallway.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Overgrown Hall - East

A mass of flowers hang from the ceiling of this corridor, pure white against the blue-green stone. White vines twine in and out of the walls. Everywhere is white mist or foliage, constantly dispersing and swirling together. You can't tell the difference between the two. The on the wall looks misty, irreal.

The hall runs to the east, where you hear the sound of running water, and the west. A stone door stands open to the south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Overgrown Hall - Graveyard

The crumpled bodies of robots lie here, overgrown with white flowers. A floats above one of the larger broken robots: a dismembered android, its one remaining eye encircled by white vines. Vines grow everywhere, twining into the old machines, sprouting from the cracks.

A stone archway to the southwest opens into a larger chamber. The hallway continues to the east.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Overgrown Hall - West

This section of the hall is piled with broken machinery: cracked glass bulbs and rusty pipes and buttons of all sorts. Enormous white flowers shine on the ceiling, the walls. Their vines have snaked into every crevice of these old machines. Lights still blink on and off on some, flashing red and green indicators, but no alarm sounds. They are beyond repair.

A is set into a wall.

A rusty door swings to the north. The hall runs to the east and west.

Overgrown Pillar

A broken pillar, covered in white vines, stands in the center of this room. Whatever it might have supported is no longer there. A levitates above the remains of the pillar, rotating slowly.

To the north, a stone door leads to an overgrown hallway.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Pit

An enormous carves this hallway in half. Water rushes into it, cascading into darkness, producing a cacophonous roar. Crossing is impossible. You cannot see the bottom.

The hall continues to the south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? They look more like lumps of stone than statues. Someone has labeled them, all the same:

The Girl Who Lived In The Reflection of A Glass of Water

Jostiphenes, the Jester with 1911 Faces

Angels' Muse

Inanity of Repetition

Blind Pilgrim Pēteris, Impaled On His Own Thorns

Statue Tower - Stairwell

This spiral staircase winds up a tall stairwell. Water drips from some secret place as you climb. protrude from alcoves in the walls, their forms weathered and overgrown by white vines. One statue that might be a blindfolded human is holding a . Going southwest takes you to a statue-filled hallway.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Statue Tower - Summit

The stone door at the top of the stairwell leads to a flat, circular roof. No parapet keeps you from jumping. Beyond is only mist, pierced through by some flickering florescence that radiates blue-green light onto the stone. A stands guard by the edge.

The stairs lead down.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Bed Room

A giant room. You cannot discern where it might end, or if it even has an end. Light shines from above, illuminating a vast assembly of floating beds, all perfectly made. Rich mahogany beds with thick velvet covers. Beds sized for children, bedazzled with pink and blue sequins. Skinny hospital beds, soggy mold-covered mattresses, sleeping bags, a , and more...

The lies under a rustic wooden bed with navy bedsheets, adorned with embroidered anchors and ships.

You can travel further from the apparatus.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Bed Room

You see hammocks floating untethered to any object that would support both ends, collections of pillows and beanbags with no bedframe to be seen, ornate wooden beds with intricately carved headboards, gold beds with gold-trimmed bedsheets, a , and more...

You can travel further from the apparatus, or closer.

Bed Room

You see beds that are enormous piles of dead leaves, and bed made of canned food, and beds made of bricks and mirrors and glass, and beds made of rotating colored polyhedrons, and a , and more...

You can travel further from the apparatus, or closer.

Bed Room

You see beds that are two-dimensional cartoon drawings, and beds that are just sketched out wireframes of three-dimensional beds, and beds that are simultaneously the number 67, and beds that are just black silhouettes of beds, and beds that are invisible but cast shadows on the floor, and a , and more...

You can travel further from the apparatus, or closer.

Bed Room

You see beds that are collections of polygons, and beds that are assemblages of writhing black lines, and beds that are sketched-out ideas of beds, and beds that are the number 81 repeated four times, and beds that are the platonic forms of conceptual beds yet to exist in reality, and a , and more...

You can travel further from the apparatus, or closer.

Bed Room

You see beds that are tautological beds, and beds that are not beds, and beds that are beds under certain mathematical assumptions relating to bedspace, and beds that only exist partially in the bed noosphere, and more...

You can bed further from the bed, or closer.

bed

bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed bed

A marble switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Bridge - Sky Island

The is screwed into a floating chunk of stone, cracked and covered in moss. To the northwest, a rickety wooden bridge extends from the chunk of stone onto the mist, slats rattling in the wind. To the east, a similar bridge extends along the south face of a sheer cliffside.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Bridge - East Cliff

The cliff rises from the mist and ascends back into the mist - you can see neither top nor bottom. Within various clefts in the rock face, you see sprigs of plants with odd blue and yellow stems, and flowers that resemble more polygons than any flowers you know. A hovers to the side.

The bridge goes east and west.

Bridge - East Landing

Another floating chunk of stone much like the one you landed on. A rests in its center.

There is another bridge continuing to the east, made of elegant wrought iron. Iron bars and iron struts form guardrails. To the west, the rickety wooden bridge leads back.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Bridge - East Ring

You are greeted by another floating island of stone, this time with the ruins of a circular wall in its center. Lying in the middle of the circle is a grimy chalice forged half of silver and half of gold.

A looks over the edge of the island.

Past it, the iron bridge has collapsed. You can see broken support pillars continuing for a few more feet in the mist, but after that there is no way forward. You can only go back west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Bridge - Flowering Island

The wooden bridge ends in a floating island with an enormous flowering tree, sporting white and pink flowers on every branch. It smells sweet, floral. Petals swirl in the wind and vanish off the side of the island, into the mist. The grass is soft and dewy.

A stands beneath the tree.

The bridge leads back southeast.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? There are... 416 scratches in total.

Cell - West

A cramped prison cell carved from rough-hewn stone. A musty blanket lies crumpled in the corner. Tight-packed steel bars to the north block off a dim corridor, where flickering wall torches illuminate other cells, all empty.

A sleek is set into the wall, incongruently bright against the grime of the cell. Next to it, a set of deep has been gouged into the stone.

To the east, a crude doorway leads to another cell.

A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Cell - East

A bare prison cell with stone walls on all sides. A cage-like made of metal bars stands in the corner, covered in dust. The air is cool and damp.

The only exit is west, where a crude doorway leads to another identically-sized cell.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Dungeon - East

In the center of this room is a stretching rack, a contraption of wooden boards and rollers with chains and manacles dangling from its sides. The southern wall is occupied by an enormous weapons shelf full of knives, scalpels and other tools. Retractable metal hooks hang from the ceiling.

A lies on the floor.

The only exit is west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Dungeon - West

A pair of manacles is chained to the northern wall. Leaning against the opposite wall is an enormous wooden spoked wheel, with razors protruding from the rim. The floor is littered with crushed bone fragments and dried puddles of something dark and odorous.

In the corner of the room, barely visible behind the wheel's rim, someone has scratched the number: 340.

Someone has slid a between two bricks in the wall.

The only exit is east.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Dungeon - North

A cauldron occupies the center of this cell, an enormous iron vessel with a complex system of levers and pulleys suspended above. A niche in the eastern wall is filled with smaller pots and cauldrons of various shapes, some covered in waxy stains.

The cauldron contains a , and nothing more.

The only exit is south.

A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Dungeon - Center

A round brick chamber. The here is crafted of iron bars and chains, and encircled by a ring of red lanterns that tinge everything a deep scarlet. Three doorways, each with a spiked iron portcullis hanging above, lead north, east, and west.

You can barely tell you've moved at all.", "You see nothing of note.", "No matter where you go, there is only more carpet, more buzzing lights.", "Nothing of interest here.", "You see nothing interesting.", "This place looks the same as the place you were in before.", "You see nothing new." ]; const source1 = [ "One of the lights here flickers slightly. Besides that, you see nothing new.", "A small puddle of something dark has dried on the carpet. It could be water.", "You see graffiti of several eyes looking in different directions, scrawled onto a nearby wall.", "You see graffiti of the number 416, scrawled messily onto a nearby wall with black spray paint.", "You see graffiti of the number 81818181, scrawled messily onto a nearby wall with gold spray paint.", "You see graffiti of the number 124, scrawled messily onto a nearby wall with red spray paint.", "Someone has scribbled the number 67 onto the wall with a black marker.", "A puddle of dark fluid has dried on the carpet here.", "Splotches of dark fluid have dried on the carpet here.", "You see a strange circular pattern graffitied onto a nearby wall.", "You see graffiti of several arrows pointing in different directions, scrawled onto a nearby wall.", "A blue dumpster sits before one of the support columns. It contains nothing.", "A cardboard box sits under a sagging spot in the ceiling.", "An empty trash can is lying on its side here.", "Pieces of metal litter the ground here. You cannot tell what they once belonged to.", "A plastic recycling bin sits under a sagging spot in the ceiling.", "A nonfunctional film camera, black and bulky, sits under a sagging spot in the ceiling.", "An empty sleeping bag lies on a cracked spot in the carpet.", "A plastic bag floats in the air here, suspended by an invisible force.", "A tattered white t-shirt lies in a crumpled pile here." ]; $(function () { const randomValue = Math.random() * 100; const flavor = document.createElement("p"); if (randomValue < 20) { flavor.innerText = window.crumblingcastle.randItem(source1); document.getElementById("familiarFlavorText").append(flavor); } else if (randomValue < 95) { flavor.innerText = window.crumblingcastle.randItem(source0); document.getElementById("familiarFlavorText").append(flavor); } }); } $(function () { const wander = document.querySelector("a.familiarPlaceNav"); wander?.addEventListener("click", () => { let newSnippet = "familiarPlaceDefault"; const randomValue = Math.random() * 100; if (randomValue < 15 && snippet.name !== "familiarPlaceApparatus") { newSnippet = "familiarPlaceApparatus"; } else if (randomValue < 30 && snippet.name !== "familiarPlacePanel") { newSnippet = "familiarPlacePanel"; } window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper(newSnippet); }); }); %>

A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Familiar Place

An expanse of yellow carpet and off-white walls. Florescent lights buzz. Square support columns extend down from the ceiling. The landscape looks identical in all directions.

The stands before you, humming quietly.

You can wander in any direction, though you suspect the one you choose will not make a difference.

Familiar Place

An expanse of yellow carpet and off-white walls. Florescent lights buzz. Square support columns extend down from the ceiling. The landscape looks identical in all directions.

You notice an camouflaged among the off-white walls, easily missable. Have you overlooked it before?

You can wander in any direction, though you suspect the one you choose will not make a difference.

Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %> <% const genFamiliarFlavorText = function() { const source0 = [ "Everything looks the same.", "Everything looks the same. You can barely tell you've moved at all.", "You see nothing of note.", "No matter where you go, there is only more carpet, more buzzing lights.", "Nothing of interest here.", "You see nothing interesting.", "This place looks the same as the place you were in before.", "You see nothing new." ]; const source1 = [ "One of the lights here flickers slightly. Besides that, you see nothing new.", "A small puddle of something dark has dried on the carpet. It could be water.", "You see graffiti of several eyes looking in different directions, scrawled onto a nearby wall.", "You see graffiti of the number 416, scrawled messily onto a nearby wall with black spray paint.", "You see graffiti of the number 81818181, scrawled messily onto a nearby wall with gold spray paint.", "You see graffiti of the number 124, scrawled messily onto a nearby wall with red spray paint.", "Someone has scribbled the number 67 onto the wall with a black marker.", "A puddle of dark fluid has dried on the carpet here.", "Splotches of dark fluid have dried on the carpet here.", "You see a strange circular pattern graffitied onto a nearby wall.", "You see graffiti of several arrows pointing in different directions, scrawled onto a nearby wall.", "A blue dumpster sits before one of the support columns. It contains nothing.", "A cardboard box sits under a sagging spot in the ceiling.", "An empty trash can is lying on its side here.", "Pieces of metal litter the ground here. You cannot tell what they once belonged to.", "A plastic recycling bin sits under a sagging spot in the ceiling.", "A nonfunctional film camera, black and bulky, sits under a sagging spot in the ceiling.", "An empty sleeping bag lies on a cracked spot in the carpet.", "A plastic bag floats in the air here, suspended by an invisible force.", "A tattered white t-shirt lies in a crumpled pile here." ]; $(function () { const randomValue = Math.random() * 100; const flavor = document.createElement("p"); if (randomValue < 20) { flavor.innerText = window.crumblingcastle.randItem(source1); document.getElementById("familiarFlavorText").append(flavor); } else if (randomValue < 95) { flavor.innerText = window.crumblingcastle.randItem(source0); document.getElementById("familiarFlavorText").append(flavor); } }); } $(function () { const wander = document.querySelector("a.familiarPlaceNav"); wander?.addEventListener("click", () => { let newSnippet = "familiarPlaceDefault"; const randomValue = Math.random() * 100; if (randomValue < 15 && snippet.name !== "familiarPlaceApparatus") { newSnippet = "familiarPlaceApparatus"; } else if (randomValue < 30 && snippet.name !== "familiarPlacePanel") { newSnippet = "familiarPlacePanel"; } window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper(newSnippet); }); }); %>

Familiar Place

An expanse of yellow carpet and off-white walls. Florescent lights buzz. Square support columns extend down from the ceiling. The landscape looks identical in all directions.

You can wander in any direction, though you suspect the one you choose will not make a difference.

<% genFamiliarFlavorText(); %>
<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Red Lounge

An enormous expanse of plastic flooring. Off-white carpeted walls. Plastic ceiling is so low it almost touches your head. Rows and rows of red plastic chandeliers hang from the ceiling, touching the floor, forming aisles you must walk around.

Wal┼±'⎽ └⎺⎼␊ ┬⎼⎺┼± ├␤▒

Room

The walls of this room blink in and out when you try to look at them. The floor judders between the texture of brick, water, and concrete. You can't tell what color anything is. You know the objects within this room must have a color, but you are incapable of describing it.

Wal┼±⎽⎼pngl�det-son-x-ka⎺┼± ├␤▒

������

The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The . The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room. The room.

You blink.

Before you is a perfectly featureless white room. White walls, floor, and ceiling. No exits. in the center.

Blink again.

I└▒±␋┼␋┼± ├␤␊⎼␊ ␋⎽ ⎽⎺└␊␉⎺␍≤ ␋┼ ├␤␊ ⎼⎺⎺└ ├␤▒├ I ␌▒┼ ├▒┌┐ ├⎺, ┬␤⎺ ␋⎽ ┌␋⎽├␊┼␋┼± ├⎺ ␊┴␊⎼≤├␤␋┼± ├␤▒├ I ▒└ ⎽▒≤␋┼±, ␊┴␊┼ ├␤⎺┤±␤ ␋├'⎽ ⎺┼┌≤ └␊. I└▒±␋┼␋┼± ├␤▒├ ├␤␋⎽ ⎻␊⎼⎽⎺┼ ␌▒┼ ⎽⎺└␊␤⎺┬ ⎼␊⎽⎻⎺┼␍, ␊┴␊┼ ├␤⎺┤±␤ ├␤␊⎼␊ ␋⎽ ┼⎺ ⎼␊⎽⎻⎺┼⎽␊, ␋├'⎽ ┘┤⎽├ └␊. I├ ┬▒⎽ ▒┌┬▒≤⎽ └␊ ▒┌┌ ├␤␊ ├␋└␊. O┼┌≤ └␊. W␊ ␤␊▒⎼␍ ├␤␊ └⎺⎽├ ±⎺␍▒┬°┤┌ ⎽␌⎼␊▒└␋┼± ␌⎺└␋┼± °⎼⎺└ S␤▒┬┼'⎽ ⎼⎺⎺└. H␊ ┐␊␊⎻⎽ ⎽▒≤␋┼± ␋├ ┬▒⎽ ┼⎺├␤␋┼±. N⎺├␤␋┼±. N⎺├␤␋┼± ┬⎼⎺┼±. N⎺ ⎻⎼⎺␉┌␊└⎽ ␤␊⎼␊. B┤├ ␤␊ ␤▒⎽ ├␤␋⎽ ┌⎺⎺┐ ⎺┼ ␤␋⎽ °▒␌␊. S⎺└␊├␤␋┼±'⎽ └⎺⎼␊ ┬⎼⎺┼± ├␤▒┼ ┼⎺⎼└▒┌. W␊ ␤␊▒⎼␍ ├␤␊ └⎺⎽├ ±⎺␍▒┬°┤┌ ⎽␌⎼␊▒└␋┼± ␌⎺└␋┼± °⎼⎺└ S␤▒┬┼'⎽ ⎼⎺⎺└. H␊ ┐␊␊⎻⎽ ⎽▒≤␋┼± ␋├ ┬▒⎽ ┼⎺├␤␋┼±. N⎺├␤␋┼±. N⎺├␤␋┼± ┬⎼⎺┼±. N⎺ ⎻⎼⎺␉┌␊└⎽ ␤␊⎼␊. B┤├ ␤␊ ␤▒⎽ ├␤␋⎽ ┌⎺⎺┐ ⎺┼ ␤␋⎽ °▒␌␊. S⎺└␊├␤␋┼±'⎽ └⎺⎼␊ ┬⎼⎺┼± ├␤▒┼ ┼⎺⎼└▒┌. REALITY WARPS AROUND YOU ␊ ␤␊▒⎼␍ ├␤␊ └⎺⎽├ ±⎺␍▒┬°┤┌ ⎽␌⎼␊▒└␋┼± ␌⎺└␋┼± °⎼⎺└ S␤▒┬┼'⎽ ⎼⎺⎺└. H␊ ┐␊␊⎻⎽ ⎽▒≤␋┼± ␋├ ┬▒⎽ ┼⎺├␤␋┼±. N⎺├␤␋┼±. N⎺├␤␋┼± ┬⎼⎺┼±. N⎺ ⎻⎼⎺␉┌␊└⎽ ␤␊⎼␊. B┤├ ␤␊ ␤▒⎽ ├␤␋⎽ ┌⎺⎺┐ ⎺┼ ␤␋⎽ °▒␌␊. S⎺└␊├␤␋┼±'⎽ └⎺⎼␊ ┬⎼⎺┼± ├␤▒┼ ┼⎺⎼└▒┌. ␊ ␤␊▒⎼␍ ├␤␊ └⎺⎽├ ±⎺␍▒┬°┤┌ ⎽␌⎼␊▒└␋┼± ␌⎺└␋┼± °⎼⎺└ S␤▒┬┼'⎽ ⎼⎺⎺└. H␊ ┐␊␊⎻⎽ ⎽▒≤␋┼± ␋├ ┬▒⎽ ┼⎺├␤␋┼±. N⎺├␤␋┼±. N⎺├␤␋┼± ┬⎼⎺┼±. F␊␊┌ ┌␋┐␊ ▒ ␉┌⎺␌┐ ⎺° ⎽├⎺┼␊ ␌⎺└␊ ├⎺ ┌␋°␊ ⎽⎺└␊␤⎺┬. ▒⎼⎼≤ ┤⎽␊␍ ├⎺ ␉␊ ▒ ⎻⎼⎺␍┤␌├␋⎺┼ └▒┼▒±␊⎼ ▒├ ⎽⎺└␊ ⎻⎺┬␊⎼ ⎻┌▒┼├. H␊ ┌⎺⎺┐⎽ ┌␋┐␊ ▒ └▒┼▒±␊⎼, ␤⎺┼␊⎽├┌≤. O⎼ ⎽⎺└␊ ┐␋┼␍ ⎺° ⎽␌␤⎺⎺┌├␊▒␌␤␊⎼. D┤┼┼⎺. <% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

{ATTEMPTING TO RE-ESTABLISH BASELINE REALITY}

{PLEASE WAIT}

Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Textured squares flicker through the sky. Wind blows through holes in the increasingly unstable wall. Parts of the floor are breaking away and levitating into the air. They form floating constellations of ston3 4nd ru66le 56435803 74973 7 24 4 6653611 990186 047 05 02 7698 06569 4 0210 1 3870 20 1 497 5840 000913 3 53 582 0306 504 2 11 484 7 8 4 8 03103 2 62 4 91701 7574 4 5 7 309 81173850 133 783 6 28 78 02 1365480 645 1 9653178 13 1 54 340 0010 7 44 4856 002 4389725 64 75 59 628660 17 102 66 4 231732 2 0 7 524 82 0483 939 2979

 �aB(>[�ؚl�ݾ�9�����!M\���9�1B�ӒI�z-º/և �㣠�- D�m�f�����7�ƶ��+ ���l�܅1֫suf�ۇC}P؋��҂* @*��+V`*��+V ��+V!�*��+V1 � 9�1T /�%!158 �=H� "autosave": false '�+V!� #### section 4 AACKh�T�~��T�~ b�T�~Xh�T�~` �T�~��T�~H5{T�~�`�T�~�5{T�~�`�T�~�)�T�i�T�~@i�T�~�5{T�~�i�T�~�5{T�~(j�T�~86{T�~�j�T�~x6{T�~k�T�~�6{T�~pk�T�~�6{T�~�k�T�~(7{T�~Hl�T�~h7{T�~�l�T�~�7{T�~0m�T�~�7{T�~�m�T�~(8{T�~���T�~X8{T�~8n�T�~�8{T�~�n�T�~h��T�~���T�~x��T�~���T�~Ȩ�T�~�&�T�~���T�~�8{T�~X��T�~ ��T�~��T�~���T�~@��T�~@��T�~���T�~9{T�~���T�~@9{T�~0Y�T�~p9{T�~@)�T�~�9{T�~h)�T�~��

Mannequin Labyrinth - Intersection

A flat gray plane stretching as far as the eye can see, under an eye-searing green sky of a markedly artificial hue. All around you are faceless white mannequins, swaying gently from side to side. They form corridors of a sort: this is a labyrinth you must walk through.

A circles around a cage-like in the center of this intersection.

You can go , , and from here.

[11111111]

Through the rain #�� 3��P�d��� the silhouettes of spires and crumbling citadels, floating beneath a dark blue sky or stone ceiling. Dark shapes almost but not quite like birds swarm across your field of view, mingling with the rain.

A few spires have lit windows. Is there anybody inside?

Rain Spire - Observatory

The walls of this small chamber are covered in blueprints for clockwork mechanisms. A particularly large piece of nailed to the wall provides space to leave messages. A stone bed in the corner is covered by a ratty old blanket. An ornate facing an elegant, rain-stained window allows view of the outside world.

The st�nds in the middle of the room.

To the eaę� is a blue door forged from a thick slab of crystal you cannot see past. To the sou�� is a heavy door of stone.
