A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Hidden Grove

The rests in the center of a small pine grove. Above, a full moon hangs in a starry sky. A summer breeze blows. The wind carries the scent of pine needles and wildflowers.

A creaks beneath a pine tree.

A gap through the pines leads northwest.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Further down, it becomes an immense cavern, an underground hollow you are entering rung by rung."; }); }); %>

You look into the well. Where you expect darkness, perhaps the shimmer of moonlight reflecting on water, you instead see a rusty ladder leading far down, towards a faint red light at the bottom.

Hidden Well

An old stone , half-covered with vines, rests in the center of another pine grove. It has clearly seen better days. A leans against the well.

A gap through the pines leads southeast.

On the Ladder

The rungs rattle, cold beneath your grip. Wind whistles through the caverns in eerie polyphony. A is placed on the cavern wall nearby.

You can climb up or down.

White Cavern

A hollow carved into the earth by hands long gone. White stone surrounds you. Stairs are cut into the ground, and a red carpet has been draped over them to soften your footfalls. Iron railings are built into the sides.

A has been planted into the cavern floor.

A rusty ladder at the top of the stairs leads up. At the bottom of the stairs, all the way down, shines a door painted with the numbers 8:10 in a red so dark it looks almost black.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Isolation Chamber

A small room with a chair fixed to the floor, facing a darkened screen. Manacles have been grafted onto the chair's arms and legs. The light in the room, originating from no apparent source, pulses a soft red.

A white door, painted with the numbers 8:10 in dark red, leads out of the room. Beneath the eye, a has been screwed onto the door.

A golden switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Golden Grotto

A small cave of shining gold metal. It feels dangerously hot, a temperature that would burn you if you could burn.

The in the center is wreathed with a frenzy of crackling embers that spark on the metal. Near it, an hovers.

An exit to the east leads to a hissing, crackling field of sulfur, with a bright line of fire on the horizon.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Molten Pumps

Searing heat fills the air. Before you is an ocean of perpetual fire, incandescent. Instead of a sandy beach, the shore is a flat plain of hissing sulfur, glittering with red and gold embers. The ocean feeds into a conglomeration of machines, tubes and pipes harvesting a constant stream of red-hot liquid from the vehemently flaming tide.

East takes you along the shore, towards a bronze tower that vents occasional bursts of steam. To the south, the rest of the beach is obscured by wavering heat and sparkling embers. To the west is a small cave, set into towering golden cliffs that block off the rest of the shore.

Harvest Mechanism 19:11-A

A multitude of pipes extend into the red ocean, pumping continuous fire into a mechanical tower adorned with various meters and dials. At the base of the tower, a network of even more pipes sprawl in various directions across the sulfur shore.

An hovers over the red surf.

You can go , where you glimpse more towers, or back west.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Brimstone Fields

Occasional arcs of flame play upon hissing sulfur. The temperature is burning hot. Barriers of flame shoot up from the smoking fields, preventing passage in any direction except north and south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Molten Pumps - South

You find an ocean of fire identical to the first, but facing south instead of north. Enormous rusted machines stand all around you, their pumps sluggish but still quite operational. Molten puddles of a glowing red-gold substance cover the ground. The floats above one such puddle.

You can only go north; bulwarks of rusted machinery block any other path.

A metallic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Transmission Summit - Base

An immense transmission tower dominates this mountaintop, its metal struts dark against the sky, its wires stretching down the forested slopes towards identical towers below. Sunlight shimmers through autumn leaves.

Boulders and smaller stones lie about the base of the tower, letting you climb up onto its lower rungs. A cage-like rests against one of the larger boulders, inconspicuous. Around the hill is a dense circle of undergrowth and tightly-packed trees. There is no path through.

Transmission Summit - Lower Rungs

The metal rungs are cool to the touch. Resting on them, you can see the sky: half bright, half darkened with immense storm clouds that rumble to the west. Cumulonimbus whorls of white and gray.

The air smells fresh, redolent with the earthly tones of forest and rain. Far below are trees and cornfields, the dark line of a river cutting through farmland, gray gravel roads where cars slowly crawl past. They shimmer in the heat, like a mirage. If you look too closely, it might all disappear.

A is taped to one of the rungs. It flutters in the wind.

The rungs are spaced too far apart to properly climb. You can only return down.

Playdeck

A plastic deck of the kind found in playgrounds, surrounded by plastic walls. The south wall is covered by an arrangement of spinning blocks, the face of each block engraved with colorful shapes. On the opposite wall, a circular window curves outward. Through it you see an expanse of darkness studded by stars. There is no sign of any other structure, man-made or otherwise, and no ground visible.

A lies on the floor.

To the west is the grinning face of an enormous caterpillar, its mouth opening into a narrow tunnel barely large enough to crawl through. To the south, a purple slide curves down into darkness.

A plastic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

Caterpillar's Stomach

An enormous chamber bulges out within a narrow tunnel of green plastic. Green string lights dangling from the ceiling brush the top of a cage-like made of metal casings and plastic bits.

You can crawl east or west through the tunnel.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Ropescape - Center

You emerge in the middle of a giant climbing net woven from thick nylon rope. All around are structures of varicolored plastic floating in a dark void. The occasional plastic platform offers a place to sit amidst the nylon web.

A sits on a plastic flap above you.

North is a plastic tube leading into a labyrinth of other plastic tubes, some dotted with windows where you can see grimy faces peeking out. To the east, a cartoon caterpillar opens its gaping mouth to reveal a tunnel you can crawl through. To the south, a series of monkey bars crosses the abyss. You can also climb up for a better view.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Ropescape - Summit

The nylon rope is densely placed, providing no shortage of handholds for your climb. Plastic platforms provide frequent rest stops.

At the highest point of the climbing net is a plastic hammock, where you can sit and gaze upon the world. It is a citadel built from plastic, a playground the likes of which you have never seen: enormous, utterly dwarfing you in scope, and completely empty besides yourself. No children or other lifeforms of any kind.

A sits in the middle of the hammock.

You can only climb down from here.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Monkey Bridge

A long bridge of monkey bars, with nothing above and below them but total darkness. The light that makes them gleam bright red comes from no apparent source.

A drifts to the side of the bridge, suspended in the void by an unseen force.

The bridge leads north to an enormous climbing net, and south, where you can glimpse something colorful at the end of the bars.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Merry-Go-Round

A colored roundabout spins slowly in the abyss, despite the lack of any outside force to keep it moving. It is divided into sections of bright green, white, orange, blue, and yellow. A sits in the white section.

Someone has graffitied the number "81818181" onto the roundabout with golden spray paint.

To the north, a bridge of monkey bars leads to other sections of the playcastle.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Downward Spiral

The slide is a tight spiral. The lights grow dimmer and dimmer as you slide, plastic squeaking beneath you, circling down.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Eventually all the light from above disappears, and you are left in total darkness.

You are still moving down.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? You sink into a sea of colored plastic balls.

You are submerged in plastic.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Struggle towards the surface.

<% $(function () { document.getElementById("struggle").addEventListener("click", () => { story.transitionMessage = "With effort, you work your way up through the ball pit, emerging onto a solid concerete surface..."; }); }); %>
<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

It smells like urine and desperation. It is barely a few balls deep.

Standing in it produces no effect.

Ball Pit

An enormous room with concrete walls, floor, and ceiling. A minuscule , half-filled, rests in the very center of the room. One of a notebook has been torn out, and lies besides it.

The only exit is a tiny door to the north.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

A plastic switch gleams prominently beneath a black screen.

Light flashes. A coruscating rip in the fabric of spacetime opens before you.

[errorNodeNotFound]

North Closet

A tiny closet. A single paltry lightbulb hangs from the ceiling. The beneath casts dark shadows, moving across the walls as the bulb swings back and forth.

A tiny door leads south.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Tube Labyrinth

The tube is dim. Just enough light filters through the plastic for you to tell how close the walls are. Cramped enough you can't even turn your head to look behind you. If you must reverse direction, you will have to do it crawling backward.

Eventually you come across a intersection where the tube splits into three paths. One of a notebook has been taped to the wall here. You can go left, center, and right.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Tube Labyrinth

This tube is blocked off by a solid wall of yellow plastic. You have no choice but to crawl backwards to the intersection from which you came.

Tube Labyrinth

You crawl through sections of tube segmented off by color: green, white, orange, blue, yellow. Occasionally you come across patterns scrawled or scratched into these tubular sections: simple shapes, stars and triangles, assortments of strange lines that may mean nothing.

Eventually you come across a intersection where the tube splits into two paths. One of a notebook has been taped to the wall here. You can go left and right.

Tube Labyrinth

The sides of this tube are covered in tally marks. You count 124 of them in total.

Eventually you come across a intersection where the tube splits into two paths. One of a notebook has been taped to the wall here. You can go left and right.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Tube Labyrinth

In the middle of this tube is a dusty plastic porthole, a window through which you can see the climbing net you came from, suspended above the abyss. Someone has drawn a smiling face in the dust, with misshapen Xs for eyes. Above it is the number "2024".

Eventually you come across a intersection where the tube splits into three paths. One of a notebook has been taped to the wall here. You can go left, center, and right.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Tube Labyrinth

Rounding a bend in the tube, you realize the path is blocked off by a solid mass of pulsating red flesh, beating arrhythmically. You have no choice but to crawl backwards to the intersection from which you came.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Tube Labyrinth

Partway through, this tube abruptly slopes up at an angle so steep you cannot crawl through. You have no choice but to crawl backwards to the intersection from which you came.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Tube Labyrinth

Halfway through this tube, you begin to hear muffled breathing and the sound of shuffling behind you. When you reach the intersection, the sound fades.

At the intersection, the tube splits into two paths. One of a notebook has been taped to the intersection wall. You can go left and right.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Tube Labyrinth

The lights flicker as you crawl and then go out, immersing you in total darkness. You are forced to progress by touch alone, feeling your way blindly through the tunnel. Once you sense the slight breeze of an intersection opening up before you, the lights flicker back on.

At the intersection, the tube splits into two paths. One of a notebook has been taped to the intersection wall. You can go left and right.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist. This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Tube Labyrinth

This tube narrows as you crawl through it, until it becomes so tight you can no longer continue to squeeze your way through. You have no choice but to crawl backwards to the intersection from which you came.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Tube Labyrinth

The tube slopes down as you crawl, becoming steeper and steeper. The walls become thinner, letting in more light from outside, where it glimmers on the plastic floor of the tunnel. Eventually you start sliding down, unable to resist the force of gravity.

You plunge, face-first...

<% $(function () { document.getElementById("plasticTransition").addEventListener("click", () => { story.transitionMessage = "...landing on a cushioning layer of plastic."; }); }); %>
<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? This will not reset your location.</p> <br/><button type="button" id="returnLink">Return.</button>'; const screenContents = document.getElementById("screenContents"); if (screenContents !== null && snippet.name != "begin") { screenContents.appendChild(menuButtons); screenContents.appendChild(startMenu); const returnLink = document.getElementById("returnLink"); returnLink.addEventListener("click", () => { startMenu.remove(); menuButtons.remove(); window.crumblingcastle.showSnippetWrapper("begin"); }) } } else { buttonTest.inert = false; } } window.crumblingcastle.addReplaceLink(); window.crumblingcastle.addMenuPanels(); window.crumblingcastle.machine.editMachineDiv(); window.crumblingcastle.musicManager.playSoundtrack(snippet.tags); }); /* Most of this was split off into script_files/readMarkerDiv.tsx and writeMarkerDiv.tsx for organization. */ let markerOpened = false; async function openMarker(event) { document.getElementById("markerDiv").show(); if (!markerOpened) { markerOpened = true; boardNumber = Number(event.target.getAttribute("board")); const ref = window.crumblingcastle; ref.lastEvaluatedKey = null; await ref.getBoard(boardNumber); ref.initialLoadDone(); } } $(function () { const whiteMarkerList = Array.from(document.getElementsByClassName("whiteMarker")); if (whiteMarkerList.length > 0) { whiteMarkerList.forEach((e) => { e.addEventListener("click", openMarker); }); const markerDiv = window.crumblingcastle.createMarkerDiv(); document.getElementById("iff-snippet").prepend(markerDiv); } }); %>

Ball Pit

An enormous ball pit under a plastic dome covered in blue-and-orange polka dots. Colored light filters through colored plastic, glimmering on the surface of the shiny ball pit sea. Towards the middle of the ball pit, a lays on the surface.

The tube you fell from is set high above the ball pit. You cannot return. The only way out is down.

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? You plunge into darkness.

As your eyes adjust, you begin to make out new shapes...

---

<% $(function () { window.crumblingcastle.addWrapperHtml(); const bottomHalf = document.querySelector("div.absoluteAlign.bottomHalf"); if (story.transitionMessage !== null) { const message = document.createElement("p"); message.classList.add("transitionMessage"); message.innerText = story.transitionMessage; bottomHalf.prepend(message); story.transitionMessage = null; } /* <div class="menuButtons blackBg2"> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="inventoryButton">Inventory</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="mapButton">Map</button> <button type="button" class="menuButton" id="partyButton">Party</button> </div> */ if (!snippet.tags.includes("menu") && !snippet.tags.includes("transition")) { // save location even if site is closed and revisited try { localStorage.setItem("kadw_graveyard_location", snippet.name); // console.log("location set (localStorage): " + snippet.name); } catch (error) { // e.g. localStorage access is turned off in browser settings } // save location to return to it after start menu is accessed // separate from localStorage save s.current_location = snippet.name; // console.log("location set (s): " + s.current_location); // add menu buttons const buttonTest = document.querySelector("div.menuButtons"); if (buttonTest === null) { const menuButtons = document.createElement("div"); menuButtons.classList.add("menuButtons", "blackBg2"); menuButtons.innerHTML = '<button type="button" class="menuButton panelOpener" id="startButton" identifier="startMenu">Start</button>'; const startMenu = document.createElement("dialog"); startMenu.classList.add("menuPanel", "smallPanel", "absoluteAlign"); startMenu.setAttribute("identifier", "startMenu"); startMenu.innerHTML = '<p>Return to start menu? Codes will remain unchanged, and messages will persist.
